insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great accomplishment starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll not only earn your first points, but also gain momentum and insight into the topics that need your focus. By taking that initial step, you'll be able to identify areas where you can improve, track your progress, and develop a study routine that will help you build a streak and steadily increase your average score over time.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
